summary: Repository bootstrap is clean and correct: .gitignore covers all required patterns (including gallery-source/, secrets, build artefacts, Room local schemas, Claude local settings), .gitattributes establishes a sound LF baseline with CRLF override for .bat/.cmd and binary markers for Android assets. Single conventional commit on phase/1-foundation, master is an annotated tag pointing at HEAD, working tree clean. The scope expansion (including .claude/, CLAUDE.md, work/) is acceptable and arguably required — those files already existed and would otherwise make git status dirty, violating the AC.

findings.issue: No entry for macOS/Linux editor cruft beyond .DS_Store/Thumbs.db (e.g. .vscode/ is not ignored). Also, hs_err_pid*.log (JVM crash dumps) is covered by *.log but replay_pid*.log is not — negligible in practice.
findings.suggestion: Optional: add .vscode/ and .fleet/ if any contributor uses those IDEs. Not required for Task 2 safety.

findings.issue: Consider adding *.onnx, *.bin, *.gguf as binary markers — LiteRT-LM fields mention .tflite/.task which are covered, but future model artefacts may appear.
findings.suggestion: Defer to when such assets actually appear in-repo; not blocking.

findings.issue: Commit message expanded scope from the literal hint in the task. The expansion is justified (AC required clean tree with exactly 1 commit and pre-existing .claude/ + work/ had to be included), and the conventional format is preserved. Deviation note should land in decisions.md per Post-completion checklist.
findings.suggestion: Record the scope-expansion deviation and rationale in work/phase-1-foundation/decisions.md (already listed as a post-completion step).

findings.issue: Tag `master` is annotated ('initial zero state') and points at HEAD; phase/1-foundation is the current branch. Matches patterns.md § Git Workflow exactly. No branch named master exists (correct).
